command:
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git add autoresearch/lib/llm.cjs _runs/benchmark-latest.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(openrouter): switch from :free to paid model — clears upstream 429 rat
wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "timeout 30 hermes -z 'Say OK and nothing else' 2>&1" 2>&1

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && rm autoresearch/fix-hermes-env.cjs && git add autoresearch/lib/llm.cjs _runs/benchmark-latest.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(hermes): set OpenRouter key in ~

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git add README.md docs/autoresearch-hermes-playbook.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs: update autoresearch section — benchmark results, correct model names

All
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git add README.md && git diff --cached --stat
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git commit -m "docs: update README — remove Nous, default Ollama+OpenRouter, add provider resolution, troubleshooting, Discord gateway"
